product_highlights: LINGOSTEM™ — lingonberry plant stem cells for UV and infrared protection and skin resilience
Phytocohesine™ PSP — plant stem cell active for scalp-hair microbiome modulation
Gatuline® Skin-Repair — meristematic cell biotech active for accelerated wound healing
Azeloglicina® — biotransformation-derived ingredient for brightening and sebum control
notes: Provital Group is a Barcelona-based biotechnology company specializing in plant stem cell and meristematic cell technology for cosmetic actives, with over 40 years of expertise in botanical ingredient innovation. Their LINGOSTEM™ platform uses lingonberry plant stem cells to deliver unique UV and infrared protection properties, while their Phytocohesine™ PSP represents a novel approach to scalp microbiome modulation via plant biotechnology. Provital's strong COSMOS and Vegan credentials combined with compelling clinical evidence make them a distinctive SKIN-TWIN reference for sustainable plant biotech actives.
